description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring long, slender, arching green leaves that radiate outward from a central base. The leaves are smooth and pointed, with a subtle gradient from a lighter green at the tips to a deeper green at the base. The plant is housed in a simple, unadorned terracotta pot with a slightly flared rim and a matte, earthy finish. The soil surface is visible at the top of the pot, appearing dark and slightly recessed. There are no visible decorative elements or plant labels attached to the pot or plant. The overall appearance suggests a hardy, low-maintenance species suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A potted plant with long, arching green leaves in a plain terracotta pot. The plant has a simple, natural look with no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from the narrow side, showing a single leaf edge-on and the round terracotta pot.
description_view_1: The plant is viewed from the broad side, displaying all the long, arching leaves radiating outward from the center.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the plant is seen from the opposite narrow side, again showing a single leaf edge-on and the pot.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, the plant is viewed from the broad side, with all leaves visible and arching outward.
